standardizers: saved inside each checkpoint as ckpt['standardizers'] — reuse at inference, do NOT refit
caveats: Scope is CLOSURES ONLY — openings were never gated (real opening yield ~0). Openings stay on the sim.

Calibration-grade: err_sim (~406) is inflated by weak OD grounding (sim_open~0 at most observed sites). The GNN's win is real and solver-robust (blast 128 vs full 137 RMSE, both vs sim 406) but partly reflects an under-loaded sim baseline.

Trained sim_open distribution differs from the app baseline: training used a ~1500-pair grounded OD (full=full-equilibrium, blast=AON). The app's edit baseline is full-equilibrium on a larger OD. VALIDATE on the GB10 that GNN predictions match the sim within threshold using the APP baseline before trusting; prefer stage2_full.pt (solver matches the app).
Inference needs sim_open (the open-road solve) as input channels — feed the cached no-edit SIM baseline, not Liron's pressure GNN.
source: PR #49 (P13 Stage-2 real fine-tune + gate); parity run on the verified full-equilibrium solver
